vibe: Technical, precise, fast, and high-contrast. Inspired by modern dev tools like Linear. It feels like a high-performance command center, avoiding generic 'SaaS dashboard' fluff.

strategies.headings: Use Outfit with tight tracking (tracking-tight). Avoid massive sizes; H1 should be text-2xl or text-3xl max in the app context to maintain a dense, tool-like feel.
strategies.body: Use Manrope for extreme legibility at small sizes (text-sm is default for app body).
strategies.labels: Use JetBrains Mono, uppercase, text-xs, tracking-widest for metadata (e.g., Task IDs like 'TSK-104', priority labels, keyboard shortcuts like '⌘K').

spacing_and_layout.general: Compact and dense. Use p-4 or p-6 for containers. Embrace the 1px grid look.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: Collapsible left sidebar (width: 240px expanded, 64px collapsed). Top bar only for search, breadcrumbs, and user profile.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard: Bento-style 'Control Room' grid for stats. Strict adherence to F-pattern layout.
spacing_and_layout.kanban: Horizontally scrolling container with vertical scrolling lists. Use gap-4 or gap-6 between columns. Columns should have a fixed width (e.g., 320px) or min-width.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Flat, cardless look where possible. Rely on 1px borders (border-zinc-800) instead of drop shadows in dark mode.

components.buttons: Flat design. Primary: Amber background, black text. Secondary: Transparent bg, zinc-800 border, white text. No rounded pills; use rounded-md for a sharp, technical look.
components.inputs: Flat, 1px border, bg-transparent. Focus state: ring-1 ring-amber-500. No heavy shadows.
components.kanban_card: Padding 4, 1px border. Must include: Task ID (Mono), Title (Body font), Priority Icon, and Assignee Avatar. On hover: border brightens, slight -translate-y-[1px].
components.badges: Minimalist. border 1px, text-xs, mono font. e.g., 'In Progress' badge has a 4px colored dot + text.
components.ai_features: Use the Amber accent color explicitly for AI-driven actions (e.g., '✨ Break down task') to differentiate from standard actions.

micro_interactions.hover_states: Subtle background color shifts (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-800/50). Avoid dramatic scale changes.
micro_interactions.loading: Skeleton loaders using animate-pulse with bg-zinc-800. No spinning loaders for content blocks.
micro_interactions.transitions: Use short durations (duration-150 or 200) for a 'snappy' and responsive feel.

assets.icons: Use lucide-react (default for Shadcn) or @phosphor-icons/react for a more polished look. Keep icon size consistent (size-4 or size-5).
